reason: Top-level backend spec index for the SQL-first toolchain and linked guideline set.
Covers auth/account contracts, connect helper behavior, admin SQL helper conventions, and bootstrap/schema expectations including auth.can_write and session_user rules.
Defines current CLI/SystemExit and SQL exception handling contracts; important because this task changes operator-facing error paths and troubleshooting guidance.
Defines required thin-wrapper patterns, checked-in SQL expectations, and regression-test requirements for skill scripts, README, and SQL changes.
